notes: Agent 1 is treated as authoritative for the model@effort universe and model specs; later files contain conflicts on some sibling specs that are preserved here only as caveats.
Benchmark efforts labeled any mean the provenance did not name a canonical effort tier or used a non-ladder label such as default or standard config.
Gaps are exact effort-level gaps; model-level any rows are retained in category_benchmarks but do not close effort-specific gap records.
Rows marked GAP in provenance are represented through gaps rather than as category_benchmarks rows because raw is required to be numeric.

Modifier rows with numeric benchmark scores were mapped to the closest fixed category only for provenance completeness: context_size and perception_required to knowledge_synthesis, long_horizon to agentic_execution.
Phase 1.5 withdrawn-self-report policy was applied by excluding the GPT-5.5 SWE-bench Verified 88.7 row and recording it in withdrawn.
Source tier is copied from explicit T/Tier labels when present; otherwise it follows the provenance label legend and source-ledger tier descriptions.
Date-only retrieved_at values reflect provenance files that supplied a retrieval date but no exact time.
Manual rows from phase-1-agent-5/04-failure-modes.md use source-ledger labels because that file reports numeric tables without per-row labels.
5 non-numeric qualitative rows were not emitted because the target schema requires numeric raw values.
